Place the following third-party MATLAB helper files in this folder after downloading them from their original sources:

- `trackmateSpots.m` — Jean-Yves Tinevez (TrackMate / FIJI)
- `ReadImageJROI.m` — Dylan Muir
- `export_fig.m` — Oliver Woodford; maintained by Yair Altman
- `scatter_kde.m` — Nils Haentjens

These files are not bundled in this public repository. Users should obtain the canonical versions directly from their original sources and comply with the original licenses or redistribution terms.

After placing them here, add this folder to the MATLAB path before running the repository scripts.
